title: IMMZD2DTMeaslesSupplementaryDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMeaslesSupplementaryDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Measles supplementary dose was not administered-131
Measles routine immunization schedule is complete-104
Live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks-92
Client is not due for measles supplementary dose-48
No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks-92
Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note-66
The client has history of anaphylactic reactions-67
Measles vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note-66
The client has history of severe allergic reactions-59
Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note-66
The client has a symptomatic HIV infection-59

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTMeaslesSupplementaryDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeaslesSupplementaryDoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
